rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the introduction to support the broad statement that limited consideration sets are common in marketing models. The citing paper does not discuss the cited paper's behavior-based pricing mechanism, assumptions, or findings, and it does not build any proposition or model step directly on that specific work. Most of the paper's theoretical positioning and derivations are tied to search and ordered-search literature instead. This indicates a passing background use rather than a distinct functional role.
